description_long: This object appears to be a compact, handheld electronic device with a rugged, metallic body and a utilitarian design. The top surface features a control panel with two prominent buttons—one red and one green—alongside a large rotary dial and a small display screen, possibly for status or readout. The device has two metallic prongs extending from one end, suggesting it may be used for testing, measuring, or interfacing with other equipment. The opposite end features a solid, rectangular handle, likely for gripping or maneuvering the device. The sides of the body show additional circular elements, possibly connectors or adjustment knobs. The overall finish is matte with visible wear, indicating frequent use in practical, possibly industrial or field environments.
description: A rugged, handheld electronic device with a metallic body, control panel, two prongs, and a solid handle. Features include colored buttons, a rotary dial, and a small display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the control panel with red and green buttons, rotary dial, and display screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the handle and the two metallic prongs extending from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the two prongs and the back of the control panel, with buttons and dial visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle and prongs, as well as side-mounted circular elements.
